name: team stat with week split only
description: Team stats from plays with week split but no year split. Verifies that team_stats CTE join does not reference a year column when year is not in splits, since the year filter is applied in the CTE WHERE clause.
expected_query:
with "base_years" as (SELECT unnest(ARRAY[2023]) as year), "player_years" as (SELECT DISTINCT player.pid, base_years.year FROM player CROSS JOIN base_years WHERE player.primary_position IN ('WR')), "player_years_weeks" as (SELECT player_years.pid, nfl_year_week_timestamp.year, nfl_year_week_timestamp.week FROM player_years INNER JOIN nfl_year_week_timestamp ON player_years.year = nfl_year_week_timestamp.year WHERE nfl_year_week_timestamp.year = 2023), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" as materialized (select "nfl_plays"."off" as "nfl_team", SUM(pass_yds) AS team_pass_yds_from_plays, "nfl_plays"."week" from "nfl_plays" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "nfl_plays"."seas_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_plays"."year" in (2023) group by "nfl_plays"."off", "nfl_plays"."week"), "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" as materialized (select "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", sum(t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c.team_pass_yds_from_plays) as team_pass_yds_from_plays, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week" from "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c" group by "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."nfl_team", "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c"."week"), "player_year_teams" as materialized (select "pid", "year", (array_agg(nfl_team ORDER BY game_count DESC, nfl_team ASC))[1] as team from (select "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year" as "year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team", count(*) as "game_count" from "player_gamelogs" inner join "nfl_games" on "nfl_games"."esbid" = "player_gamelogs"."esbid" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023) and "player_gamelogs"."season_year" in (2023) group by "player_gamelogs"."pid", "nfl_games"."season_year", "player_gamelogs"."nfl_team") as "player_year_team_counts" group by "pid", "year"), "player_participation_weeks" as (SELECT pid, year, week, bool_or(active) AS active
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2023::int AS year, g.week, pgl.active
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2023 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE g.season_type = 'REG' AND g.season_year = 2023) src
          GROUP BY pid, year, week), "player_years_teams" as (SELECT pid, year, array_agg(DISTINCT team_code) AS teams
          FROM (SELECT pgl.pid, 2023::int AS year, pgl.nfl_team AS team_code
       FROM player_gamelogs_year_2023 pgl
       INNER JOIN nfl_games g ON g.esbid = pgl.esbid
       WHERE pgl.active = TRUE AND g.season_type = 'REG' AND g.season_year = 2023) src
          GROUP BY pid, year), "team_weeks_played" as (select distinct "team", "year", "week" from ((select "h" as "team", "season_year" as "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023)) union all (select "v" as "team", "season_year" as "year", "week" from "nfl_games" where "nfl_games"."season_type" in ('REG') and "nfl_games"."season_year" in (2023))) as "g") select "player"."pid", player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays" AS "team_pass_yds_from_plays_0", "player_years_weeks"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END AS participation_status, "player"."primary_position" from "player" inner join "player_years_weeks" on "player_years_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" left join "player_year_teams" on "player_year_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_year_teams"."year" = 2023 left join "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats" on "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."nfl_team" = "player_year_teams"."team" and t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats.week = player_years_weeks.week left join "player_participation_weeks" on "player_participation_weeks"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_participation_weeks"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" and "player_participation_weeks"."week" = "player_years_weeks"."week" left join "player_years_teams" on "player_years_teams"."pid" = "player"."pid" and "player_years_teams"."year" = "player_years_weeks"."year" where player.primary_position IN ('WR') group by player.first_name, player.last_name, "t764ff2be9b73614ad08120e35ca3741c_team_stats"."team_pass_yds_from_plays", "player_years_weeks"."week", CASE
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.active THEN 'active'
     WHEN player_participation_weeks.pid IS NULL
          AND player_years_teams.teams IS NOT NULL
          AND NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1 FROM team_weeks_played
            WHERE team_weeks_played.year = player_years_weeks.year
              AND team_weeks_played.week = player_years_weeks.week
              AND team_weeks_played.team = ANY(player_years_teams.teams)
          )
       THEN 'bye'
     ELSE NULL
   END, "player"."pid", "player"."last_name", "player"."first_name", "player"."primary_position" order by 4 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
